title: vasconcellea × heilbornii var. fructifragrans
intro: Vasconcellea × heilbornii var. fructifragrans, also known as the Fragrant Tree Colla, is a plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is native to the Andean region and has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, due to its high content of antioxidants and other bioactive compounds. Vasconcellea × heilbornii var. fructifragrans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
